phases.name: Critical Security & Data Integrity
phases.goal: Fix SQL injection risks, missing commits, and phantom column references

tasks.description: Fix SQL injection risk in strategies/storage.py - f-string SQL interpolation
steps: Replace f-string INTERVAL clauses with parameterized queries at lines 562, 564, 609
Use %s placeholders with tuple parameters instead of f-string interpolation

tasks.description: Add missing conn.commit() in update_live_performance and record_daily_performance
steps: Add conn.commit() after execute() in update_live_performance (around line 323)
Add conn.commit() after execute() in record_daily_performance (around line 392)

tasks.description: Fix phantom column reference live_metrics_updated_at in storage.py
steps: Read storage.py line 319 and models.py lines 160-194
Check if live_metrics_updated_at column exists in database schema
Either remove the column reference or add to model and migrate

tasks.description: Fix SQL placeholder inconsistency in list_strategy_seeds endpoint
steps: Replace dynamic dollar-sign placeholders ($1, $2) with standard %s format
Update lines 755, 758, 764, 770-776 to use consistent %s placeholders
Run pytest tests/unit/api -k strategies --tb=short to verify

phases.name: Repository Pattern Completion
phases.goal: Move raw SQL from API/tasks to storage/repository layer

tasks.description: Move sitemap SQL to storage layer - run_discovery and _save_health_result
steps: Update sitemap_service.py to call storage methods instead of raw SQL

tasks.description: Complete reference_tasks repository pattern adoption
steps: Replace raw SQL at line 232 with repo.get_latest_cache_entry_date()
Replace raw SQL at line 319 with repo.get_cache_entries_with_payloads()
Replace raw SQL at line 904 with repo.upsert_risk_metrics()

tasks.description: Move strategy seeds queries to StrategyStorage
steps: Add list_seeds() and get_seed_by_id() methods to StrategyStorage
Update API endpoints to call storage methods

phases.name: DRY Violations & Helper Consolidation
phases.goal: Eliminate duplicate code patterns and consolidate helpers

tasks.description: Use _build_cleanup_result in log_cleanup_tasks.py consistently
steps: Replace manual result dict construction with _build_cleanup_result() helper

tasks.description: Extend _handle_missing_directory for cleanup_old_models and cleanup_solution_state
steps: Use helper in cleanup_old_models_task and cleanup_solution_state_task

tasks.description: Create status response helpers in strategy_monitoring_tasks.py
steps: Read strategy_monitoring_tasks.py - identify status dict construction patterns
Update all 7 task functions to use the helpers

tasks.description: Replace _safe_float and _safe_datetime_to_iso with shared formatters in strategies.py
steps: Import parse_float and format_db_date from app.utils.formatters

phases.name: Architecture Improvements
phases.goal: Fix layer violations and extract bloated functions

tasks.description: Extract HTTP client creation helper in sitemap_service.py
steps: Update all 4 httpx.AsyncClient creations to use the helper

tasks.description: Extract completion metadata helper in base.py agent
Extract _serialize_tool_result helper in base.py
steps: Create _serialize_tool_result(result) helper encapsulating json.dumps with json_serializer

tasks.description: Fix yfinance direct usage in market.py get_sector_history
steps: Move sector history fetching to app/sources/yfinance_source.py
Update endpoint to call the new method

phases.name: Code Cleanup & Magic Numbers
phases.goal: Extract constants, remove redundant comments, standardize patterns

tasks.description: Extract magic numbers in watchlist.py (stale threshold, cache TTL, Redis key)
steps: Update all usages to reference constants

tasks.description: Extract regex pattern constants in sitemap_service.py
steps: Read sitemap_service.py - find regex patterns for title, tabs, etc.

tasks.description: Replace SELECT * with explicit column lists in strategies/storage.py
steps: Replace SELECT * with explicit column lists matching _convert_row expectations
Update _convert_row to use consistent column mapping

tasks.description: Fix counter increment duplication in log_cleanup_tasks.py
steps: Refactor to increment counters unconditionally AFTER if/else block

phases.name: Final Verification
phases.goal: Run full test suite and verify all changes

tasks.description: Run full backend test suite
steps: Document any failures and their causes

tasks.description: Run frontend build verification
